indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed is large and comfortable, but it is not suitable for computer work due to its size and lack of a desk.

indicators.name: shelf
indicators.rationale: The shelf provides storage space for personal items, which can be useful for organizing work-related materials.

indicators.name: floor-wood
indicators.rationale: The wooden floor is neutral and does not affect the suitability of the space for computer work.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo) due to the presence of a comfortable bed and a shelf for storage, but lacks a dedicated workspace.
